attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_XXSCM_PL_BACKLOG_HISTORY)

FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_BACKLOG_HSTRY STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_BACKLOG_HSTRY,
  (
 select TRANSACTION_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_BACKLOG_HSTRY
 minus
 select TRANSACTION_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_XXSCM_PL_BACKLOG_HISTORY
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.TRANSACTION_ID = STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_BACKLOG_HSTRY.TRANSACTION_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_BACKLOG_HSTRY.REFRESH_DATETIME
